title: cienfuegosia sulfurea
intro: Cienfuegosia sulfurea, also known as the golden bush or yellow fountain bush, is a flowering plant species in the mallow family, native to South Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cienfuegosia sulfurea include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the Cienfuegosia sulfurea plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
